seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Caltowie North and Caltowie West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Caltowie North vs Caltowie West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caltowie North and Caltowie West.
heading: Caltowie North vs Caltowie West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caltowie North, South Australia and Caltowie West, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caltowie West has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Caltowie North (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caltowie North or Caltowie West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caltowie North has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Caltowie West scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caltowie North scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Caltowie West scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caltowie North or Caltowie West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caltowie West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
